went_well: 4 fragmented wiki design docs merged into one canonical file (wiki/reports/shadow-lord-rts-rpg-hybrid-design.md); originals trashed; index/log/graph updated (3,472 nodes)
Battle-screen SPA plan (4 views, cooldown pad, wave/breach) promoted to confirmed design with determinism invariant stated explicitly
Resource plan formalized: dungeon/player/enemy/skill/effect/sound/animation/object with P1-P3 pipeline (gti painterly, ElevenLabs, Blender headless)
Action-verb dictionary (move/strike/cast/explore/scout/jump/guard/evade) with authority column + seeded-FSM AI NPC spec (6 archetypes, 250ms tick)
TTK bands finally defined (S1 75s / S2 100s / S3 120s ±15%) — G2 TTK row now judgeable
went_wrong: v1 log-growth formula survived in docs long after code diverged — canonical-source rule (code wins) was written down only now
Cooldown-reduction reward (Stillwater Hourglass) shipped in battle screen without combo-EV re-verification
Wiki discoverability was poor: 60+ auto-ingested noise entries dominated index over 4 real design docs

improvement_actions.action: Re-verify combo EV including cooldown-reduction reward in next simulator batch (G2)
Port tests/playtest-browser-3stage.cjs to a puppeteer-core fallback so battle E2E runs without playwright dependency
Produce resource batch P1 (player 3-pose, 3 enemy sprites, 3 arena floors, breach alarm) per canonical §4 naming/size guards
Implement seeded-FSM AI NPC per canonical §4.2 with breach as the only engine-touching output
